message:
🐛 Clear cache when toggling to demo mode

When switching from live mode to demo mode, in-memory caches were
retaining stale live data. Cards would show cached Kubernetes data
instead of their demo data.

Changes:
- Add resetToInitialData() method to CacheStore class
- Subscribe to demo mode changes at module level
- When demo mode toggles ON, reset all cache stores to initial data
- This ensures all 150+ cards display demo data consistently

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
